message:
fix(db): add reaper_exempt column to create_agent and insert_system_agent INSERTs

Both create_agent() and insert_system_agent() were missing the
reaper_exempt column in their INSERT statements. While SQLite's DEFAULT
clause would set it to 0, this was inconsistent with register_agent()
which explicitly includes the column, and could cause issues if the
DEFAULT ever changed.

Both now explicitly INSERT reaper_exempt = 0 (non-exempt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
